mapper.insert:
insert into test_instrument_appraisal_record(name, code, appraisal_date, operate, appraisal_result, file_url) values
(#{entity.name}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.appraisalDate}, #{entity.operate}, #{entity.appraisalResult}, #{entity.fileUrl})

insert into test_instrument_appraisal_record(name, code, appraisal_date, operate, appraisal_result, file_url) values
(#{entity.name}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.appraisalDate}, #{entity.operate}, #{entity.appraisalResult}, #{entity.fileUrl})
on duplicate key update name = values(name) , code = values(code) , appraisal_date = values(appraisal_date) , operate = values(operate) , appraisal_result = values(appraisal_result) , file_url = values(file_url)
